title: French Open 2026: Alexandra Eala to team up with Victoria Mboko for doubles; Venus Williams returns after five years - olympics.com
summary_full: French Open 2026: Alexandra Eala to team up with Victoria Mboko for doubles; Venus Williams returns after five years  olympics.comWimbledon remains Eala’s favorite Grand Slam  The Manila TimesFilipina tennis star Alex Eala to play doubles with Canada's Victoria Mboko in the Roland-Garros (French Open). Meanwhile, Eala is still playing in the qualifiers of the WTA 500 Internationaux de Strasbourg, also in France. | via Dyan Castillejo, ABS-CBN News  FacebookAlex Eala joins Emma Raducanu in playing one last tournament before Roland Garros  TennisheadEala to team up with Canada's Mboko for French Open doubles  Philstar.com
